nasb.text: “We have a little sister, And she has no breasts; What shall we do for our sister On the day when she is spoken for?

esv.text: We have a little sister, and she has no breasts. What shall we do for our sister on the day when she is spoken for?

cnv.text: 我們有一個小妹妹， 她的兩乳還未發育完全； 有人來提親的時候， 我們當為她怎樣辦理呢？

ccb.text: 我们有一个小妹， 她的胸脯还没有发育。 若有人来提亲， 我们该怎么办？
